entries.name: Fel Domination
entries.desc: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

entries.name: Soul Leech
entries.desc: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Burning Rush
entries.desc: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

entries.name: Fel Pact
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

entries.name: Demon Skin
entries.desc:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

entries.name: Fel Armor
entries.desc:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

entries.name: Fiendish Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Demonic Embrace
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 10%.

entries.name: Nightmare
entries.desc: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

entries.name: Horrify
entries.desc: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

entries.name: Demonic Fortitude
entries.desc: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

entries.name: Banish
entries.desc: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

entries.name: Curse of Exhaustion
entries.desc:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Curse of Tongues
entries.desc:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Infernal Beneficiary
entries.desc: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

entries.name: Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

entries.name: Pact of the Annihilan
entries.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Circle
entries.desc:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

entries.name: Pact of the Satyr
entries.desc: Increases your haste by 2%.

entries.name: Improved Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Dark Pact
entries.desc: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 950 for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

entries.name: Foul Mouth
entries.desc: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

entries.name: Empowered Healthstone
entries.desc: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

entries.name: Abyss Walker
entries.desc: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Fortified Soul
entries.desc: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
entries.desc:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
entries.desc: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

entries.name: Ichor of Devils
entries.desc: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

entries.name: Frequent Donor
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

entries.name: Pact of the Eredar
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

entries.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
entries.desc: Increases your Leech by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

entries.name: Empowered Drain Life
entries.desc: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

entries.name: Strength of Will
entries.desc: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

entries.name: Dark Accord
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Gateway
entries.desc: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

entries.name: Howl of Terror
entries.desc: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Shadowfury
entries.desc: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

entries.name: Swift Artifice
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

entries.name: Soul Link
entries.desc:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. 

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Frequent Traveler
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

entries.name: Fel Synergy
entries.desc: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

entries.name: Oppressive Darkness
entries.desc:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

entries.name: Pact of Gluttony
entries.desc:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 sec cooldown.

entries.name: Soulburn
entries.desc:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Blight of Weakness
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Blight of Tongues
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Chaos Bolt
entries.desc: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, dealing a critical strike for 3,113 Chaos damage. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Conflagrate
entries.desc:
Triggers an explosion on the target, dealing 1,346 Fire damage.

Generates 5 Soul Shard Fragments.

entries.name: Rain of Fire
entries.desc:
Calls down a rain of hellfire the target location, dealing 1,395 Fire damage over 7.1 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

entries.name: Rain of Fire
entries.desc:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing 1,395 Fire damage over 7.1 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

entries.name: Improved Conflagrate
entries.desc: Conflagrate gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Backdraft
entries.desc: Conflagrate reduces the cast time of your next Incinerate, Chaos Bolt, or Soul Fire by 30%. Maximum 2 charges.

entries.name: Practiced Chaos
entries.desc: Increases Mastery by 2%.

entries.name: Roaring Blaze
entries.desc:
Increases Conflagrate damage by 10%. 

Conflagrate now erupts the target's Immolate, spreading it up to 3 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Explosive Potential
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Conflagrate by 2 sec.

entries.name: Mayhem
entries.desc:
Your single target spells have a 35% chance to apply Havoc to a nearby enemy for 5.0 sec.

 Havoc
Marks a target with Havoc for 5.0 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Havoc
entries.desc: Marks a target with Havoc for 15 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Scalding Flames
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Immolate by 25% and its duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Shadowburn
entries.desc:
Blasts a target for 1,856 Shadowflame damage. Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health.

Restores 1 Soul Shard and refunds a charge if the target dies within 5 sec.

entries.name: Backlash
entries.desc:
Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Physical attacks against you have a 20% chance to make your next Incinerate instant cast. This effect can only occur once every 6 sec.

entries.name: Improved Havoc
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Havoc by 5 sec and increases the damage Havoc victims are dealt by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Ashen Remains
entries.desc: Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, and Incinerate deal 3% increased damage to targets afflicted by Immolate.

entries.name: Cataclysm
entries.desc: Calls forth a cataclysm at the target location, dealing 1,362 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards and afflicting them with Immolate.

entries.name: Fiendish Cruelty
entries.desc: Critical strikes dealt by Chaos Bolt, Conflagrate, or Incinerate have a 10% chance to make your next cast of Shadowburn within 30 sec cost no Soul Shards and usable on any target regardless of health.

entries.name: Chaotic Inferno
entries.desc: Increases Chaos Bolt damage by 5% and Chaos Bolt now has a 25% chance to make your next Incinerate instant.

entries.name: Flashpoint
entries.desc:
When your Immolate deals periodic damage to a target above 80% health, gain 2% Haste for 10 sec.

Stacks up to 3 times.

entries.name: Summon Infernal
entries.desc:
Summons an Infernal from the Twisting Nether, impacting for 229 Fire damage and stunning all enemies in the area for 2 sec.

The Infernal will serve you for 30 sec, dealing 210 damage to all nearby enemies every 1.8 sec and generating 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec.

entries.name: Emberstorm
entries.desc: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 20%.

entries.name: Fire and Brimstone
entries.desc: Incinerate now also hits all enemies near your target for 25% damage.

entries.name: Lake of Fire
entries.desc:
Cataclysm now leaves behind a lake of fire that deals 2,281 Fire damage to enemies within it over 8.9 sec.

Immolate deals 20% increased damage to enemies within the lake of fire.

entries.name: Reverse Entropy
entries.desc: Your spells have a chance to grant you 15% Haste for 8 sec.

entries.name: Internal Combustion
entries.desc: Chaos Bolt consumes up to 5 sec of Immolate's damage over time effect on your target, instantly dealing that much damage.

entries.name: Crashing Chaos
entries.desc: Summon Infernal increases the damage of your next 8 casts of Chaos Bolt by 25% or your next 8 casts of Rain of Fire by 35%.

entries.name: Rain of Chaos
entries.desc: While your initial Infernal is active, every Soul Shard you spend has a 15% chance to summon an additional Infernal that lasts 8 sec.

entries.name: Summoner's Embrace
entries.desc: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

entries.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
entries.desc:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal 142 additional Shadow damage.

Lasts until canceled or until you summon a demon pet.

entries.name: Ruin
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike damage of your Destruction spells by 15%.

entries.name: Improved Chaos Bolt
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Destructive Rapidity
entries.desc: Increases how quickly Rain of Fire deals damage by 25% and how quickly your Infernal's Immolation deals damage by 10%.

entries.name: Devastation
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 3%.

entries.name: Dimensional Rift
entries.desc:
Chaos Bolt and Shadowburn have a 10% chance to rip open a hole in space and time, opening a random portal that damages your target:

Shadowy Tear
Deals 3,143 Shadow damage over 14 sec.

Unstable Tear
Deals 2,696 Chaos damage over 6 sec.

Chaos Tear
Fires a Chaos Bolt, dealing 1,240 Chaos damage. This Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

Generates 10 Soul Shard Fragments.

entries.name: Soul Fire
entries.desc:
Burns the enemy's soul, dealing 10,205 Fire damage and applying Immolate.

Generates 1 Soul Shard.

entries.name: Chaos Incarnate
entries.desc: Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, and Shadowburn always gain at least 70% of the maximum benefit from your Mastery: Chaotic Energies.

entries.name: Conflagration of Chaos
entries.desc: Conflagrate and Shadowburn have a 100% chance to guarantee your next cast of either ability to critically strike, and increase its damage by your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Diabolic Embers
entries.desc: Incinerate now generates 100% additional Soul Shard Fragments.

entries.name: Demonfire Infusion
entries.desc:
Periodic damage from Immolate has a 4% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

Incinerate has a 25% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

entries.name: Channel Demonfire
entries.desc: Launches 15 bolts of felfire over 2.7 sec at random targets afflicted by your Immolate within 40 yds. Each bolt deals 150 Fire damage to the target and 73 Fire damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Avatar of Destruction
entries.desc:
Casting Soul Fire summons an Overfiend.

Opening a Dimensional Rift has a chance to summon an Overfiend instead.

 Summon Overfiend
Generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec and casts Chaos Bolt at 80% effectiveness at its summoner's target. Lasts 8 sec.

entries.name: Inferno
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Summon Infernal by 30.0 sec and increases your Mastery by 3%.

entries.name: Alythess's Ire
entries.desc: Rain of Fire has a 20% chance to reduce the cost of your next Rain of Fire within 8 sec by 100%.

entries.name: Raging Demonfire
entries.desc: Channel Demonfire fires an additional 2 bolts. Each bolt increases the remaining duration of Immolate on all targets hit by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Embers of Nihilam
entries.desc:
Casting Incinerate has a chance to evoke an echo of the Dark Titan's power.

 Echo of Sargeras
Hurl an ember torn from Nihilam at the target, dealing 712 Shadowflame damage and an additional 617 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Curse of the Satyr
entries.desc:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

 Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
entries.desc: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

entries.name: Seeds of Their Demise
entries.desc:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 378 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

entries.name: Mark of Xavius
entries.desc:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

entries.name: Zevrim's Resilience
entries.desc: Dark Pact heals you for 625 every 1 sec while active.

entries.name: Illhoof's Design
entries.desc: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Blackened Soul
entries.desc:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal 378 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

entries.name: Wither
entries.desc:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 76 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 1,285 Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Replaces Corruption.

entries.name: Malevolence
entries.desc:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 4,808 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

entries.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
entries.desc:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

entries.name: Xalan's Cruelty
entries.desc: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

entries.name: Xalan's Ferocity
entries.desc: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

entries.name: Hatefury Rituals
entries.desc: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

entries.name: Bleakheart Tactics
entries.desc: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

entries.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
entries.desc: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

entries.name: Devil Fruit
entries.desc: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

entries.name: Through the Felvine
entries.desc:
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

entries.name: Secrets of the Coven
entries.desc:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 5,119 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

entries.name: Ruination
entries.desc:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 9,644 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Abyssal Dominion
entries.desc: Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

entries.name: Flames of Xoroth
entries.desc: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

entries.name: Soul-Etched Circles
entries.desc: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

entries.name: Annihilan's Bellow
entries.desc: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

entries.name: Gloom of Nathreza
entries.desc: Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

entries.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
entries.desc: Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Machine
entries.desc: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

entries.name: Cloven Souls
entries.desc: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Vitality
entries.desc: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Bulwark
entries.desc: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Diabolic Ritual
entries.desc:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

entries.name: Touch of Rancora
entries.desc:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

entries.name: Mind's Eyes
entries.desc: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Looks That Kill
entries.desc:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active.

 Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing 304 Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

entries.name: Diabolic Oculi
entries.desc:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 891 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
